name: /measure-rubric --action-cards emits REPLACE: <old> -> <new> for deprecated rules with replaced_by populated per E-10 cross-reference
command:
mkdir -p tree && printf 'name: src
rules:
  - id: old-rule
    deprecated: true
    replaced_by: ["new-rule"]
' > tree/r.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/measure-rubric.sh" --tree tree --action-cards 2>err.txt && grep -q 'REPLACE: old-rule -> new-rule' err.txt && echo replaced 1>&2
